posts.author: Bkostinsky (Brandon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m seeking a skilled developer to set up custom API webhooks within Monday.com to monitor and send updates from MondayDocs to Zapier.

Project Requirements:
Webhook 1:
Query the board to retrieve all item IDs and their associated MondayDocs.
Parse the document content to detect changes in specific sections (e.g., “Customer Info,” “Technician Notes”).

Webhook 2:
Trigger: Detect any updates in MondayDocs (field or section-specific).
Details: Send the document ID, section updated, updated content, and timestamp to Zapier in JSON format.

Trigger: Run daily (e.g., 6 PM) to compile “Technician Notes” from all

posts.author: SirEric (Eric Maranga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bkostinsky ,

We’re Monday.com partners and development experts with extensive experience in custom API integrations and webhook development. Your project sounds exciting, and we’d be happy to assist in building these custom webhooks to meet your exact requirements.

Feel free to reach out to me via email at mail@creativebits.us or Contact Creative Bits. We’d be happy to help!

posts.author: deepvyas (Deep Vyas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bkostinsky,

Please connect further, If you are still hiring a professional

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Brandon,

I have worked on quite a few Monday.com integrations.

Setting up the API webhooks to monitor MondayDocs and parse specific sections is right in my wheelhouse.

Would love to discuss your project in more detail and provide a timeline estimate.

You can reach out to me on my email here

Colin
